title: My certificates
subtitle: Keep every earned certificate in one place and complete your profile whenever a passed course is waiting for certificate generation.
libraryDescription: Issued certificates and passed courses waiting for a complete profile all appear here.
previewDescription: Open the official certificate directly as a PDF whenever you are ready to save or share it.
pdfFailed: Failed to open the certificate PDF.
printDescription: Use your browser print dialog to save this certificate as a PDF with the current official signatures.
emptyDescription: Once you pass a certifying course final test, your certificate record will appear here.
pendingMeta: Waiting for profile completion before issuance
pendingTitle: Complete your profile to generate this certificate
pendingDescription: You already passed the certifying course. Add your first and last name in your profile and we will issue the certificate automatically.
noSelection: Select a certificate from the list to preview it here.
noSelectionWithProfilePrompt: Once you pass a certifying course, complete your profile and your certificate will appear here.
